title: [BUG] Named range lost
author: zymon

comments.author: Alanscut
aliaksei-lebedzeu
zymon
comments.body:
I've discovered more problems:
- hidden name ranges are always removed
- ranges like: **'Name1'!$1:$1048576** are removed (any range that spans to the entire worksheet or all rows or all columns)
- long ranges cause performance problems (can crash the web page). I suppose this is becauase of the way the range validation is done
